title: 2025-12-03 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 11.61
description: Today’s retreat-pressure snapshot for 2025-12-03: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 11.61/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and volatility shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: The daily signal helps separate noise from persistent multi-factor stress. On 2025-12-03, the score printed 11.61/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and volatility doing most of the work.
